title: saxifraga rosacea subsp. steinmannii
intro: Saxifraga rosacea subsp. steinmannii, also known as Steinmann's saxifrage, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the saxifrage family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling, ease pain, and prevent infection. Steinmann's saxifrage can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
